utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Hello ? No she can not come to the phone right now . Oh , right no problem . Okay , bye ... bye .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Was it my work ? Were they mad ? Was it Jack ? Did he yell ? !

emotion_cause.span: 2_Was it my work ? Were they mad ? Was it Jack ? Did he yell ? !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: J ... j ... just relax , nobody yelled . Jack just was calling to make sure that you were getting better .

emotion_cause.span: 3_nobody yelled . Jack just was calling to make sure that you were getting better .
